title: AppParameters
content:
# AppParameters

Inherits from: MessageBuilder


Parameters Builder. Set application parameters in bulk.

Args:
    resource (Optional[KRNAppVersion]): Optional Kelvin Resource name for the target App Version.
        Defaults to current app.
    parameters (List[AssetParameters]): list of single asset parameters


## Methods


### to_message() -> ParametersMsg
summary: Parameters Builder. Set application parameters in bulk.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import AppParameters

# Usage example
app = AppParameters()
